home.hero_title: Buy Low. Sell High. Profit Smart.
home.hero_subtitle: SneakPrice scans eBay live to find underpriced sneakers you can flip for profit on StockX, GOAT, and more.
home.step1_desc: Enter a sneaker name or upload a photo to identify it.
home.step2_desc: We scan live eBay listings and compare to StockX and GOAT prices.
home.step3_desc: See the spread, ROI, and where to buy and sell for maximum profit.
home.photo_subtitle: Upload a sneaker photo and our AI will identify it and find arbitrage opportunities.

encyclopedia.check_resale_desc: Scan any colourway with SneakPrice to see live eBay market data and arbitrage opportunities in real time.

lang_page.coming_soon_desc: The full SneakPrice experience in {language} is on its way. We're working hard to bring you live sneaker market data, arbitrage tools, and the encyclopedia in your language.
